description: Optional MCP servers — pick & copy into mcp-servers.json as needed (claude-forge v3.0)

memory.description: Knowledge graph across sessions. NOTE: Claude Code 2026 ships Auto Memory (~/.claude/projects/.../memory/) — consider before adding.
memory.when_to_use: Team-shared knowledge graph, cross-project memory, or when Auto Memory is insufficient.

exa.description: Exa AI web search and company research.
exa.when_to_use: When built-in WebSearch is insufficient (company/people deep research, semantic search with filters).

github.when_to_use: When gh CLI is not installed or you prefer structured tool calls. Most users can use gh CLI via Bash directly.

fetch.when_to_use: Fallback when jina-reader is rate-limited or blocked.

sequential-thinking.when_to_use: Complex planning or chain-of-thought intensive tasks. Often redundant with Claude's own reasoning — measure before adding.

supabase.description: Supabase DB management (SQL, migrations, edge functions).
supabase.when_to_use: Supabase projects — alternative to direct psql/CLI.

_notes.chrome-devtools-moved: v3.0.1: chrome-devtools was promoted to mcp-servers.json (default set). See MCP-MIGRATION.md.
